jsonLd.title: SEBI is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at SEBI are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SEBI:
SEBI is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SEBI!
